title: The Awesome Pack
description: a non-kitchen sink (believe it or not), vanilla+ modpack for my friends and i
body: a non-kitchen sink (believe it or not), vanilla+ modpack for my friend and i based around a policy of “one for all, all for one”, mainly meaning no dual purpose mods and every mod is added for expansion of a mod or having a unique feature that’s brought into the modpack (ignore let’s do candlelight tomato :3) this modpack is comprised of having content for a large majority, both the technical aspect and the combat aspect, create & it's expansions are here for the technical aspect of the mod, and for the combat side there are multiple RPG series mods, simply skills, and simply swords. this doesn't really have a list because this is a private modpack, but you'r efree to use it if you want :D recommended mods is ftb teams, and ftb chunks which are unavaliable on the modrinth platform but you are free to download them if you want _fyi, this version of the modpack was made to run on mac therefore some windows optimizatons mod may not be included, you are free to add them_
